import pytest
from source import process_batch


def test_process_batch_includes_last_element():
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert result == [2, 4, 6], (
        f"process_batch({items}) returned {result}; "
        "expected all elements doubled including the last one"
    )


def test_process_batch_single_element():
    result = process_batch([42])
    assert result == [84], (
        f"process_batch([42]) returned {result}; "
        "a single-element list must not be skipped"
    )
